rules.rule: When your human tells you something important, STOP and write it to a file BEFORE continuing the conversation
rules.reason: Context can be lost to compaction. Files survive, memory doesn't.

rules.rule: Every 2 significant operations, save findings to a file. Don't accumulate context in your head.
rules.reason: Compaction can happen at any time. Externalize immediately.

rules.rule: After every debugging session or mistake, write an event to memory/learning/events.jsonl
rules.reason: Learning only works if events are captured. This is the foundation.
